{| class="infobox"
! colspan="2" class="infobox-title" | {{{name}}}
{{#if:{{{cover|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} colspan="2" class="infobox-image" {{!}} {{{cover|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{released|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Released
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{released|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{isbn|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} ISBN
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{isbn|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{publisher|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Publisher
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{publisher|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{pages|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Pages
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{pages|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{follows|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Follows
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{follows|}}}
}}
{{#if:{{{precedes|}}}|
{{!}}-
{{!}} class="infobox-label" {{!}} Precedes
{{!}} class="infobox-data" {{!}} {{{precedes|}}}
}}
|}<noinclude>Book infobox (generated; styling in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]]).</noinclude>
